prompt:
Rebase PR #3 (branch: agent/20260409-1119-f37f) onto main to resolve merge conflicts.

## Context
PR #3 adds a DNS CLI tool and reusable dns-sync workflow. The branch has diverged from main and has merge conflicts (GitHub shows mergeable: false). CI hasn't run since the original push on April 9.

## What to do
1. Fetch latest main
2. Rebase the branch onto origin/main, resolving any conflicts
3. Force-push the rebased branch
4. Verify CI triggers on the new push

## Constraints
- Do NOT squash or rewrite commit messages
- Preserve all existing commits on the branch
- If conflicts are complex, inspect both sides carefully before resolving
